title: salvia campanulata var. codonantha
intro: Salvia campanulata var. codonantha, also known as Mexican blue sage, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties, making it useful for treating digestive issues and relieving pain. The health benefits of Salvia campanulata var. codonantha include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and providing relief from anxiety and stress. Herbal preparations of this plant may include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
